title: Projects
content: Projects # \(\) Research on multi-frequency mixed signal decomposition method | Bachelor Thesis, Sep. 2020 – Jun. 2021 # Part of a state-level topic in China and supervised by Prof. Dongmei Fu, Bio-Inspired Computing and Intelligent Information Processing Lab, Beijing Proposed a signal decomposition algorithm based on variational method which is scene adaptive on non-stationary signal and has higher accuracy compared with EMD, VMD in analysis of ECG signals and bearing signals Analysed the signals and trends of corrosive atmospheric components as chlorine and sulfur around mainland China based on galvanic corrosion data collected by observation stations of State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) Programmed a signal decomposition and feature extraction toolbox (Copyright Registration: No.2021SR0872462) Awarded the outstanding undergraduate thesis

title: About
content:
About # Hi, this is my personal website and is keeping updating, you can find here information regarding my recent works and research. Welcome to get connect with me.
This website is hosted on GitHub and was generated by Hugo which is the world’s fastest framework for building websites.
This site has been validated by the W3C:‎ ‎ ‎ ‎ ‎

title: Demonstrations
content:
Demonstrations # Wigner Semi-circle Law # A combinatorial proof and simulations of Wigner’s semicircle law, presented by Andjela Todorovic and me.
An animation of our simulation, shows the convergence of the empirical spectral distribution of a random matrix.
